title: quant_Bigramoptimizer-spikinghashnet submission
author: Laalinibh

data.description: Hash-based token embedding with separate unigram and bigram tables; bigram index uses previous-token and current-token hashing.
Output projection reuses tok_emb.weight when tie_embeddings=True.
Spiking causal self-attention with gated query stream, learned q_gain, and causal scaled dot-product attention.
Learned residual mixing inside transformer blocks.

other_params.optimizer_split: token embeddings trained with Adam; matrix parameters trained with Muon; scalar/control parameters trained separately

novel_contributions: BigramHashEmbedding with separate unigram and bigram hash tables
Spiking causal self-attention with membrane-style state and gated query stream
Optimizer split across token embeddings, matrix parameters, and scalar/control parameters
Bug fix to train both unigram_table.weight and bigram_table.weight
